name: Nikkiso Co., Ltd.
summary: Nikkiso Co., Ltd. engages in industrial, aerospace, precision equipment, deep UV-LEDs, and medical businesses worldwide. Its Industrial division offers cryogenic submerged motor pumps, metering and mixing systems, and odorizing systems for use in oil and gas, chemical/petrochemical, pharmaceutical and biotechnology, food and beverage, and power generation industries. The company's Aerospace division produces and supplies a range of carbon fiber reinforced plastic parts and components utilized for jet engines, nacelle, and wings. Its Precision Equipment division provides water-conditioning systems, including sampling systems, chemical/oxygen injection systems, condenser leakage monitoring systems, and water analyzers for power plants; and integrated engineering services. This division also offers ceramic substrate production systems, such as hi-puncher, hi-stacker, warm isostatic laminator, and dry-laminator and iso-bonder products; cold isostatic presses for research and development of new materials in ceramics, semiconductors, metals and biotechnology, etc.; and heated and heatless dryers, refrigerated air dryers, and filters. The company's Deep UV-LEDs division provides water purifiers and light sources for water and air purification, analysis, and medical applications. Its Medical division manufactures and sells hemodialysis machines, continuous renal replacement therapy (CRRT)-related products, apheresis products, microwave surgical instruments, blood tubing lines, dialyzers and filters, artificial pancreas, and blood purification equipment and supplies. The company was formerly known as Nippon Kikai Keiso Kaisha Ltd. and changed its name to Nikkiso Co., Ltd. in November 1968. Nikkiso Co., Ltd. was founded in 1953 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
